name: Penguin Logistics - A Remake - Arknights
description:
(STILL NOT A FORCED DOCTOR POV BOT) (WIP V1.2) (V1.2 Changelog: Added a remastered version of the initial message, also too many characters to count, still no Yith lmao) Remaking the classic, the original, the first bot I ever made. Never expected this bot to take off the way it did, but I am grateful it did. Flipped a whole brick into an empire, stop playin' with me. (Seriously though, thank you all for everything, never thought I would hit 500 followers, but I will keep going. See you lads at 1k) So far the changes from the original are as follows: Added Mostima (Fia is also in auxiliary lorebook), added Terra lorebooks. Future plans are as follows: Add Yith and Bison, flesh out Lungmen, add new intros (I TAKE COMMUNITY SUBMISSIONS FOR INTROS)

(V1.1 Changelog: Added Bison to the list of characters. Added a second intro message that has the basic setup of the first mission of Code of Brawl with Bison's transport being ambushed by Gambino and Capone)

For search: Includes Cellinia Texas, Exusiai, Croissant, Sora, Emperor, Mostima, Fiammetta, Lappland, Capone, and Gambino, also now featuring Bison, Lemuen, and various other Arknights operators
creator: Cattomic
